markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review GrowthX's content partnership proposal for Tines.](https://fathom.video/share/zVFtEsSz4HQJ74YUfBA16uk5TKUfkSeU?tab=summary&timestamp=73.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**The Proposal:** A $250k partnership to scale content production (5 articles/week) via AI workflows, aiming for rapid organic traffic and AI search visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/zVFtEsSz4HQJ74YUfBA16uk5TKUfkSeU?tab=summary&timestamp=123.0)
  - [**The Model:** GrowthX combines AI workflows with human experts (e.g., ex-TechCrunch EIC Matthew Panzarino) to ensure quality and brand voice.](https://fathom.video/share/zVFtEsSz4HQJ74YUfBA16uk5TKUfkSeU?tab=summary&timestamp=953.0)
  - [**Tines's Concerns:** Michael O'Connell needs to vet the leadership (Marcel) before committing to the investment, citing risks around quality control and internal resourcing.](https://fathom.video/share/zVFtEsSz4HQJ74YUfBA16uk5TKUfkSeU?tab=summary&timestamp=92.0)
  - [**Next Step:** A follow-up meeting is scheduled for Wed, Feb 18 at 9:00 AM Pacific with GrowthX CEO Marcel to address these concerns.](https://fathom.video/share/zVFtEsSz4HQJ74YUfBA16uk5TKUfkSeU?tab=summary&timestamp=1767.0)

## Topics

### Tines's Need & Concerns

  - [Tines is considering a \~$250k partnership with GrowthX to drive long-tail traffic for its new self-serve plans.](https://fathom.video/share/zVFtEsSz4HQJ74YUfBA16uk5TKUfkSeU?tab=summary&timestamp=123.0)
  - [Michael O'Connell requires a meeting with CEO Marcel before committing to the investment, citing the need to vet the leadership behind the proposed "unusual billing terms."](https://fathom.video/share/zVFtEsSz4HQJ74YUfBA16uk5TKUfkSeU?tab=summary&timestamp=92.0)
  - [Key concerns for Tines:](https://fathom.video/share/zVFtEsSz4HQJ74YUfBA16uk5TKUfkSeU?tab=summary&timestamp=1709.0)
      - [**Quality Control:** How GrowthX maintains quality at scale, especially with a distributed team.](https://fathom.video/share/zVFtEsSz4HQJ74YUfBA16uk5TKUfkSeU?tab=summary&timestamp=982.0)
      - [**Internal Resourcing:** How Tines can effectively manage the partnership without a dedicated Head of Content.](https://fathom.video/share/zVFtEsSz4HQJ74YUfBA16uk5TKUfkSeU?tab=summary&timestamp=1709.0)

### GrowthX's Proposed Solution

  - [**Model:** An "end-to-end partner" using AI workflows and human experts to deliver content at scale.](https://fathom.video/share/zVFtEsSz4HQJ74YUfBA16uk5TKUfkSeU?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/zVFtEsSz4HQJ74YUfBA16uk5TKUfkSeU?tab=summary&timestamp=729.0)
      - [**Phase 1: Strategy Sprint (8 weeks)**](https://fathom.video/share/zVFtEsSz4HQJ74YUfBA16uk5TKUfkSeU?tab=summary&timestamp=729.0)
          - [Develop "artifacts" (deep-dive documents on personas, products) to serve as custom inputs for AI workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/zVFtEsSz4HQJ74YUfBA16uk5TKUfkSeU?tab=summary&timestamp=729.0)
          - [Deliver a content strategy and roadmap.](https://fathom.video/share/zVFtEsSz4HQJ74YUfBA16uk5TKUfkSeU?tab=summary&timestamp=812.0)
          - [Produce 10+ initial articles to calibrate on quality.](https://fathom.video/share/zVFtEsSz4HQJ74YUfBA16uk5TKUfkSeU?tab=summary&timestamp=820.0)
      - [**Phase 2: Production (Ongoing)**](https://fathom.video/share/zVFtEsSz4HQJ74YUfBA16uk5TKUfkSeU?tab=summary&timestamp=1534.0)
          - [Scale to 5 articles/week.](https://fathom.video/share/zVFtEsSz4HQJ74YUfBA16uk5TKUfkSeU?tab=summary&timestamp=1558.0)
          - [Provide a Looker dashboard for weekly performance review (traffic, conversions).](https://fathom.video/share/zVFtEsSz4HQJ74YUfBA16uk5TKUfkSeU?tab=summary&timestamp=1564.0)
          - [Track AI search visibility and share of voice against competitors.](https://fathom.video/share/zVFtEsSz4HQJ74YUfBA16uk5TKUfkSeU?tab=summary&timestamp=1595.0)
          - [Continuously update artifacts with client feedback to refine brand voice.](https://fathom.video/share/zVFtEsSz4HQJ74YUfBA16uk5TKUfkSeU?tab=summary&timestamp=1612.0)
  - [**Team & Quality Control:**](https://fathom.video/share/zVFtEsSz4HQJ74YUfBA16uk5TKUfkSeU?tab=summary&timestamp=982.0)
      - [The delivery team is primarily in-house staff with deep organic growth experience (e.g., ex-GitHub, HP).](https://fathom.video/share/zVFtEsSz4HQJ74YUfBA16uk5TKUfkSeU?tab=summary&timestamp=851.0)
      - [AI workflows handle research and drafting, while human experts provide strategic direction and final edits.](https://fathom.video/share/zVFtEsSz4HQJ74YUfBA16uk5TKUfkSeU?tab=summary&timestamp=1048.0)
      - [GrowthX limits new clients to two per week to ensure quality control.](https://fathom.video/share/zVFtEsSz4HQJ74YUfBA16uk5TKUfkSeU?tab=summary&timestamp=1037.0)

### Potential Use Cases

  - [**UGC Optimization:** Michael O'Connell proposed using GrowthX's model to optimize Tines's user-generated content (UGC) story library.](https://fathom.video/share/zVFtEsSz4HQJ74YUfBA16uk5TKUfkSeU?tab=summary&timestamp=1406.0)
  - [**GrowthX's Relevant Experience:**](https://fathom.video/share/zVFtEsSz4HQJ74YUfBA16uk5TKUfkSeU?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
      - [**Zapier:** Explored building their templates library.](https://fathom.video/share/zVFtEsSz4HQJ74YUfBA16uk5TKUfkSeU?tab=summary&timestamp=1445.0)
      - [**Lovable:** Used their API to create search-optimized apps for a template library.](https://fathom.video/share/zVFtEsSz4HQJ74YUfBA16uk5TKUfkSeU?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Tyler Pavlas:**](https://fathom.video/share/zVFtEsSz4HQJ74YUfBA16uk5TKUfkSeU?tab=summary&timestamp=1767.0)
      - [Schedule follow-up meeting with Marcel for **Wed, Feb 18 at 9:00 AM Pacific**.](https://fathom.video/share/zVFtEsSz4HQJ74YUfBA16uk5TKUfkSeU?tab=summary&timestamp=1857.0)
      - [Upvote Tines's self-serve plans on Product Hunt.](https://fathom.video/share/zVFtEsSz4HQJ74YUfBA16uk5TKUfkSeU?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
  - [**Michael O'Connell:**](https://fathom.video/share/zVFtEsSz4HQJ74YUfBA16uk5TKUfkSeU?tab=summary&timestamp=1902.0)
      - [Forward Marcel's cold email to Tyler to share best practices on AI-driven SDR outreach.](https://fathom.video/share/zVFtEsSz4HQJ74YUfBA16uk5TKUfkSeU?tab=summary&timestamp=1902.0)
